---
title: "Letitia Maria Heathcote"
---

## Letitia Maria Heathcote

**Dates:** (1828/9-1910)

**Maiden name:** (Daly)

### Description

daughter-in-law of Sir William Heathcote

### Biography

A Roman Catholic, she married (1849) Sir William Perceval Heathcote, 6th Bt..

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 7 th [1876]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
